parameters.name: reps
parameters.description: Number of repetitions of P/R design (with trials shuffled) in each block

parameters.name: responsemode
parameters.description: Response mode: spacebar (keyboard), leftclick (mouse), touchscreen (touch), clicktarget (click target box), userselect (custom key)

parameters.name: usemouse
parameters.description: DEPRECATED: Whether the mouse should be used instead of shift key.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: the color of star to use.

parameters.name: useBJPD
parameters.description: Whether the Bezdein original design should be used (80% targets on both blocks)
